description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in ZebraFeeds 1.0, when register_globals is enabled, allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the zf_path parameter to (1) aggregator.php and (2) controller.php in newsfeeds/includes/.
